name: wasla-genie
description: Universal synchronization layer for AI agent orchestrators

scripts.build: npm run check && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc
scripts.sync: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync --scope workspace
scripts.watch: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js watch --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.sync:claude:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from claude --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.sync:gemini:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from gemini --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.sync:openclaw:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from openclaw --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.sync:opencode:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from opencode --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.sync:cursor:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from cursor --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot --to github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:claude: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to claude --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:gemini: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to gemini --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:opencode: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to opencode --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:cursor: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to cursor --scope workspace
scripts.sync:github-copilot-cli:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js sync-to --from github-copilot-cli --to github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.visualizer: npm run visualizer:build && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js visualizer --scope workspace
scripts.check: npm run type:check && npm run format:check
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix
scripts.clean: node -e "['dist', '.nyc_output', 'output', 'coverage'].forEach(p => require('fs').rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check && npm test

author: Mustafa BAHAA
